creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
> Does this mean that default set of options in the ports collection 
> (MPM_EVENT=on for apache24 and ZTS=off for php) are mutually incompatible?

No. Apache is non-threaded per default (MPM_PREFORK=on, MPM_WORKER=off, MPM_EVENT=off) and php has ZTS=off per default. So its compatible.

If you choose MPM_WORKER or MPM_EVENT to be on, you alter the default of apache to make it build threaded, thus settign MPM_PREFORK=off.

Does this clear the picture? Which other questions can i help you with?

Greetings,
Torsten
